title: Maximum Sum of Two Non-Overlapping Subarrays
hints: Focus on the boundary between the two subarrays. Once you fix the split point, the problem becomes finding the best window of length L to the left and the best of length M to the right.
Precompute the maximum sum of a contiguous subarray of length K ending at or before index i for all valid i. This allows O(1) lookup for the best left or right candidate.
Calculate prefix sums to get any subarray sum in O(1). Then, for each possible split point, combine the precomputed best-left and best-right sums to find the global maximum.
